//: PLACEHOLDER SHAPE (scaffold — not wired). Attenuation (PRD §11): a SUB-AGENT handed a $2 slice of the parent's $5 cross-rail authority provably cannot exceed $2 on ANY rail — the slice is a cryptographic attenuation a non-trusting party can verify offline, not a processor's say-so. Config keys pinned during the build against the probes.

subagent_grant.//: ⊆ the parent's $5 — the verifier enforces subset; the sub-agent cannot widen it

expect_refusal.//: the sub-agent's call past its $2 slice is refused usage-cap-exceeded on either rail, even though the parent's $5 has room
